retrieved_result: Did Ringo Starr say Paul McCartney died in 1966? "Chantal de Paus, Lifelong Beatles fan and avid researcher of Beatles facts/trivia. Answered Dec 3, 2016 · Author has 348 answers and 812.5k answer views No, he didn't. The article people will mention as Ringo's confession is actually fake. It was published on a satirical website akin to the Onion."
